title: Smooth Swapping - Forge Updated (1.20.1)
description: Moves items smoothly in inventories. For Forge, but updated to 1.20.1.
body:
# Smooth Swapping

### Official [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping) Page
-------

### Smooth Swapping is a client side mod that animates item movement inside of inventories.

**Smooth Item animation inside an inventory**
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydZic5r4/images/d8f15765da5939e01ea42de6c874e57739ffcf39.gif)
## Smooth Swapping settings menu (took from the official curseforge page)

- Toggle button to activate and deactivate the mod
- Slider to adjust the animation speed
- Graph to change the animation curve
- Right click with your mouse on an empty space to create a new curve point
- Left click and drag a point to move it. The first and last point can't be moved though
- Right click on a point to delete it
- Small inventory to test your animation
![asd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ydZic5r4/images/5dbec7a2d372ea902d66e99fa4be88e36920f810.gif)
